creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 221052
patch to files in devel/py-python-dtrace

0.0.10 includes a fix for a memory leak.

NB: files/patch-dtrace__cython_consumer.pyx becomes OBE with this update.  Remove it.

I have compared the distfiles and find nothing unusual other than the above fix.  OTOH I cannot test it further because I do not have any systems available that have the rearranged ZFS directories.
